readiness_findings: The certified OCS chain is coherent as a bounded cognition subsystem.
The chain can assemble context, perform cognition, derive replay-based intent, maintain memory and continuity, resolve semantics, and create proposal-only PPP handoff candidates.
Each certified runtime preserves replay-visible evidence and deterministic reconstruction.
Each certified runtime preserves non-authority boundaries.
The OCS chain is not yet an operator-facing end-to-end improvement workflow.
The OCS chain is not yet a PPP invocation workflow.
remaining_blockers: Unified OCS chain inspection is missing.
OCS candidate review queue is missing.
Operator candidate selection lifecycle is missing.
Approved OCS-to-PPP invocation bridge is missing.
OCS provider necessity policy specialization is missing.
End-to-end multi-operation and multi-session pressure certification is missing.
commit_message: Certify OCS end-to-end bounded cognition readiness
